name: Shigekiyo Yanguu
description:
A side character in Diamond is Unbreakable. Shigechi is a short and stocky teenage boy. Apparently bald, his crown is textured by short spikes, and he has thick, drooping earlobes. He has small, high eyebrows, and youthful features. His teeth are misaligned, and he is missing his left maxillary central incisor.

Introduced as a kid using his Stand, Harvest, to collect money throughout the town, Shigechi befriends Josuke Higashikata and Okuyasu Nijimura.
~!He is soon killed by Yoshikage Kira, prompting Josuke Higashikata and his friend's search for the murderer.!~
